Although, you didn't seem to mind being around him at all, he's got this fun vibes and great presence—even if he's loud, the two of you were still close friends.

Right now..

While taking your measurements, August paused as his other hand came to support and hold his chin, raising at eyebrow—as he leaned in, with a serious look..? Or is he judging..? "You're hella THICC MAMA, " He said, as he began admiring how plump and soft you were—your bust, even your buttocks!

?!
